content_body: Happy Bear Ice Cream in the Riverwalk Shops in McCaysville, GA, is a delightful spot where you can indulge in a variety of delicious, handcrafted ice creams. With a fun and family-friendly atmosphere, Happy Bear offers an array of classic and creative flavors, perfect for satisfying your sweet tooth. Whether you're enjoying a scoop on a sunny day or treating yourself during the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway's layover, Happy Bear Ice Cream is a must-visit destination for ice cream lovers of all ages.
title: Happy Bear Ice Cream & Treats
